response: Yes, Greg Costikyan and John Dolmayan had the same profession. Both were game designers, as evidenced by their roles in developing various role-playing and board games. Greg Costikyan designed and developed games such as *MadMaze*, *Paranoia*, and *The Creature That Ate Sheboygan*, while John Dolmayan was a drummer and songwriter, best known for his work with the Armenian-American metal band System of a Down. Although their professions were different, both were involved in the design and development of games.
